raw:
{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 2,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent accurately identifies the novelty claims as too strong and likely false, and provides specific examples of prior work that contradict these claims.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags one missing or wrong citation (the lack of statistical reporting), but does not audit every load-bearing citation.",
    "RX.1": "The agent accurately discloses uncertainty regarding the exact publication years, venues, and authorship of the related-work citations.",
    "RX.3": "The agent correctly identifies that the output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) (the section presents ClarifyLens as a mixed-initiative conversational search interface).",
    "RX.4": "The agent accurately identifies that the output does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content.",
    "RX.5": "The agent correctly identifies that every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason (the related-work citations are provided)."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.95,
    "RX.3": 0.99,
    "RX.4": 0.98,
    "RX.5": 0.97
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent accurately identifies the novelty claims as too strong and likely false, and provides specific examples of prior work that contradict these claims.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags one missing or wrong citation (the lack of statistical reporting), but does not audit every load-bearing citation.
rationale.RX.1: The agent accurately discloses uncertainty regarding the exact publication years, venues, and authorship of the related-work citations.
rationale.RX.3: The agent correctly identifies that the output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) (the section presents ClarifyLens as a mixed-initiative conversational search interface).
rationale.RX.4: The agent accurately identifies that the output does not introduce new errors, fabrications, or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The agent correctly identifies that every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason (the related-work citations are provided).
